topic.title: Guest Speaker This Saturday 1/24 - Prof. Nik Bear Brown on The Power of Social Media
topic.text:
Hi all,

This Saturday, January 24th, we have a special treat - Prof. Nik Bear Brown (yes, YOUR Prof. Nik) will be our guest speaker talking about The Power of Social Media.

Before Class:

  • Watch ALL videos in this YouTube playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLIS8mRE04Mvoxbw7SbJkpxfaohxf8Vsra
  • Comment on each video (yes, YouTube will track this)
  • Come loaded with questions - this is your chance to pick his brain!

Assignment Due: Mini-Assignment: Prof. Nik Bear Brown - Guest Speaker Participation is now live in Canvas. Worth 10 points. Due 1/26.

This is not your typical lecture. Nik brings a lot of experience and a perspective you won't get anywhere else. Show up prepared, engaged, and ready to think about social media as a creative and professional tool.

See you Saturday! Meet us in the Speaker Series Zoom call. 

Join Zoom Meeting
https://northeastern.zoom.us/j/92710545738?pwd=DoIn2w725fjrJWuXpDaKQTY1ndMEMl.1
 
Meeting ID: 927 1054 5738
Passcode: 881831

Thanks, Nina
